name: TVFN Chef Du Jour
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Chimayo chile powder or Ancho -- Pasilla, etc.
12 ounces center cut Ahi tuna loin. (must be block shaped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the tuna loin with salt.
2. Roll the seasoned tuna in the spice mixture.
3. Heat a hot pan with canola oil.
4. Sear the tuna for 10 seconds on each side, keeping it very rare.
5. Refrigerate the tuna to make slicing easier.
